profileStructure.accountMeta: Max 7 profiles (1 primary + 6 additional) · 2 simultaneous streams
profileStructure.hierarchyDescription: Hulu Account → Profiles → Settings hierarchy. Hulu standalone app shutting down in 2026; content migrating to Disney+ app.

technicalRecon.subtitle: Internal REST API (undocumented), Node.js/React web stack, AWS infrastructure

apiArchitecture.title: Internal REST API (Undocumented)
apiArchitecture.description: Hulu's web app (built on Node.js/React/Next.js) communicates with backend microservices via REST-style API calls. Unlike Netflix (which has a well-studied Falcor/Shakti API surface) or Peacock (GraphQL via AWS AppSync), Hulu's internal API has minimal public documentation or community reverse-engineering. The backend runs on a hybrid AWS + on-premise architecture via their 'Donki' PaaS system. As Hulu transitions into Disney+, the API surface is migrating to Disney's unified streaming backend (BAM Tech / Disney Streaming Services), making current endpoints a moving target.

codeExample.comment: // Hulu authentication endpoint (inferred from web app behavior)

endpoints.purpose: Live TV channel guide (Live TV plan only)

authDetails.label: Primary Auth
authDetails.description: Set at login via auth.hulu.com. Exact TTL unknown; likely days to weeks.

authDetails.label: Device Fingerprint
authDetails.description: Used for household sharing detection (crackdown active since March 2024).

authDetails.label: PIN Protection
authDetails.description: Required to access non-Kids profiles when enabled. Password needed to change PIN.

authDetails.label: No MFA
authDetails.description: Hulu does not offer native 2FA/MFA. No email verification, no SMS codes for settings changes.

rateLimitNotes: No explicit rate limiting documentation; standard AWS WAF likely in place
Household sharing detection active since March 2024 via IP analysis
No known CAPTCHA challenges during normal browsing sessions
Session cookies have unknown TTL; aggressive refresh may be needed
Hulu standalone app being phased out in 2026 -- API surface is a moving target
technicalRecon.harCaptureCount: Internal APIs undocumented; HAR capture recommended for adapter development

tosWarning.title: Hulu Subscriber Agreement -- Automated Access Prohibition
tosWarning.description: Hulu's Subscriber Agreement explicitly prohibits accessing services using robots, spiders, scripts, or other automated means, including for AI tools, data mining, or web scraping. Violations may result in account limitation or termination 'at Hulu's sole discretion.' As a Disney subsidiary, Hulu benefits from Disney's substantial legal and enforcement resources.

overallRisk.description: Higher than Netflix due to active household sharing detection and Disney's enforcement infrastructure. No MFA makes writes simpler but account suspension risk is elevated.

detectionVectors.mitigation: Use Playwright stealth plugin (playwright-extra) to mask automation signals
Run automation from user's home network or residential proxy. Hulu actively monitors since March 2024.
Maintain consistent browser profile and device ID across sessions
Standard stealth mode, human-like timing, jitter between actions
Minimize re-authentication; cache session cookies aggressively
Batch changes; add random delays between operations

mitigationsChecklist: Enable Playwright stealth mode for all browser sessions
Run automation from consistent IP matching user's household location
Cache session cookies aggressively to minimize login frequency
Maintain persistent browser profile and device fingerprint
Add human-like random delays (2-8s) between navigation steps
Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
Monitor for account suspension signals and alert user immediately
Plan for Hulu app shutdown -- transition to Disney+ adapter

stats.label: Phosra-Added
stats.color: bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-300 ring-1 ring-green-300 dark:ring-green-700

gapOpportunities.title: Screen Time Limits
gapOpportunities.gap: Hulu has ZERO screen time controls. No native way for parents to restrict daily viewing hours. No 'are you still watching?' prompt. Children can watch indefinitely.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra enforces schedule-based profile access via PIN toggle. Enable PIN at bedtime, disable in morning. Device-level controls recommended for time-based limits since Hulu lacks timestamp data in watch history.

gapOpportunities.title: Activity Alerts
gapOpportunities.gap: Hulu sends no parent alerts. Parents have zero real-time visibility into what their child watches, including exposure to FX on Hulu mature content or unfiltered ads.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra polls watch history via Playwright and notifies parents of new titles watched. Cannot provide real-time alerts but can send periodic summaries.

gapOpportunities.title: Bedtime Mode
gapOpportunities.gap: Hulu has no time-of-day restrictions. Children can watch on-demand or live TV content at any hour without restriction.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra toggles PIN protection on schedule to block non-Kids profile access during bedtime hours. Note: this is an account-wide lock affecting all non-Kids profiles.

gapOpportunities.title: Ad Content Protection
gapOpportunities.gap: On ad-supported plans, advertisements are NOT filtered by profile maturity. A child can see TV-MA ad trailers while watching a TV-PG show. This gap does not exist on Netflix, Disney+, or Apple TV+.
gapOpportunities.solution: Phosra recommends families with young children subscribe to the ad-free tier. For ad-supported subscribers, Phosra prominently documents this risk and suggests device-level ad blocking where possible.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.detail: Scrape watch history via Playwright every 4-6 hours. Extract title names and progress indicators. No timestamps or duration data available.

steps.title: Detect
steps.detail: Compare current watch history against last known state. Detect new titles watched. Cannot calculate duration or timing due to missing timestamp data.

steps.title: Lock
steps.detail: Toggle PIN protection on via Playwright at scheduled times (e.g., bedtime). This locks ALL non-Kids profiles, not just the target child's profile.

steps.title: Notify
steps.detail: Push notification to parent via Phosra app with list of new titles watched, profile lock status, and any detected concerns.

limitations.title: No timestamp data in watch history
limitations.description: Hulu's watch history shows titles and progress but no dates, times, or session durations. Phosra cannot calculate daily watch time or determine when viewing occurred.

limitations.title: Account-wide PIN (not per-profile)
limitations.description: Locking one child's profile via PIN toggle locks ALL non-Kids profiles on the account. This affects parents and other family members, making it a blunt enforcement tool.

limitations.title: Unfiltered ads on ad-supported plans
limitations.description: Ad content bypasses profile maturity restrictions. A child on a Kids profile can still see TV-MA ad trailers. No Phosra workaround exists for this gap.

limitations.title: Hulu app shutting down in 2026
limitations.description: The standalone Hulu app is being phased out. All content migrating to Disney+. Any Hulu-specific adapter has a limited remaining lifespan.

enforcementFlow.loopLabel: Repeats on schedule until parent adjusts settings

methods.name: authenticate
methods.recommendation: Use stealth mode. Cache session cookies. Household detection is the primary risk -- run from user's network if possible.

methods.name: listProfiles
methods.recommendation: Scrape profile picker page. Investigate internal REST endpoint via HAR for more reliable path.

methods.name: getProfileSettings
methods.recommendation: Scrape profile edit page. Limited data: Kids toggle, autoplay, PIN status. No configurable maturity level.

methods.name: setContentRestrictions
methods.recommendation: Binary Kids/Standard model. No configurable maturity slider. Cannot change birthdate-based restrictions.

methods.name: setTitleRestrictions
methods.recommendation: Hulu does not support per-title blocking. Feature does not exist.

methods.name: setProfilePIN
methods.recommendation: Toggle PIN via Parental Controls page. Password re-entry required. Account-wide scope.

methods.name: getWatchHistory
methods.recommendation: Scrape History page. Titles and progress only -- no timestamps or duration. Severely limited value.

methods.name: lockProfile
methods.recommendation: Toggle PIN protection. WARNING: account-wide -- locks ALL non-Kids profiles.

methods.name: createKidsProfile
methods.recommendation: Add Profile flow with Kids toggle. No PIN required for Kids profile creation. Max 7 profiles total.

methods.name: supportsNativeScreenTime
methods.recommendation: Returns false. Hulu has zero native screen time features.
